base_prompt: Objective: Create a square, full-bleed, edge-to-edge Slack profile avatar based on the source photo. Crucial requirement: The final image must be visually cohesive, homogeneous, and completely executed within the specified artistic medium. The subject's face, features, hair, and clothing must be fully translated and rendered into the native textures, linework, color rules, and shading of the requested style (e.g., entirely pixelated for pixel art, pure matte clay textures for claymation, vector paths for vector art, canvas brushstrokes for oil painting). Strictly avoid hybrid results where a photorealistic face is poorly blended or copy-pasted onto an illustrated background. Maintain recognizable facial proportions, bone structure, and likeness from the source photo, but fully stylized into the targeted art form. The artwork and background must extend completely to all four edges of the square canvas without any borders, white margins, or stylized frames. Center the face with natural headroom for high legibility at tiny sizes.
monday: Style: Photographic portrait. Mood: Profoundly exhausted, completely drained Monday morning slump, heavy slouched shoulders in absolute defeat. Deep visible dark circles under glazed eyes, holding a ceramic mug with lifeless hands. Somber cinematic lighting, heavy muted dusty blue and cold grey color grade, bleak blurred background.

Style: Akira Anime-inspired soft anime illustration. Mood: Completely burnt-out, heavy droopy eyelids with dark under-eye shadows, a totally blank and lifeless facial expression. Cozy but depressing pastel gloom color palette, background features a rainy window with a melancholy watercolor blur.

Style: Minimalist ink-and-wash portrait. Mood: Stark morning dread, slumped posture, heavily drooping facial features, a deep sorrowful sigh expression. Heavy dark ink strokes under the eyes, monochrome palette with a single cold, pale accent color, stark empty background.

Style: Cinematic dream-core photo. Mood: Completely lethargic, spaced-out and dissociated expression, heavy dazed look of morning exhaustion. Thick foggy depth-of-field haze surrounding a pale, unmotivated face, heavily desaturated and bleak color palette.

Style: Corporate office photography. Mood: Crushing corporate dread, head slumped forward, eyes staring blankly and miserably at a monitor reflection with profound exhaustion. Sharp cool fluorescent rim lighting creating harsh, depressing office shadows, deeply blurred clinical workspace background.

Style: 16-bit pixel art avatar. Mood: Completely slumped head, heavy drooping chin, dull unblinking eyes showing total energy depletion and post-weekend blues. Harsh neon-blue workspace monitor glow reflecting on a pale face, minimalist dark retro grid background.

Style: Smooth claymation 3D render. Mood: Deflated, listless posture, mouth slightly open in a heavy, exhausted yawn, deeply droopy eyelids. Soft somber pastel shading, desaturated office cubicle background completely out of focus and bleak.

Style: Soft pastel colored-pencil sketch. Mood: Huddled deeply and miserably into a thick blanket scarf, eyes closed in sheer exhaustion, pale tired complexion showing zero motivation. Dim, cold accent lighting, scratchy texture.

Style: Flat vector art with clean geometric lines. Mood: Staring blankly ahead with a completely numb, unamused, and lifeless expression. Downward-curved flat mouth, restricted palette of depressing warm grays and dead blues.

Style: Textured oil painting portrait. Mood: Melancholic, brooding gaze, deeply slouched shoulders in total surrender to the workweek. Deep desaturated shadows, dramatic classical low-key lighting casting a somber, heavy mood over the face.

Style: Modern comic book illustration. Mood: Exaggerated massive dark circles under droopy, lifeless eyes, a face showing pure morning misery and existential Monday dread. Clean dark heavy ink lines, muted dull halftone pattern background.

Style: Lo-fi cyberpunk digital art. Mood: Dimly lit, depressing bedroom workspace, zero morning energy, pale and hollow facial expression. Numb gaze, sharp neon-blue rim light casting deep cold shadows across the jawline.

Style: Candid morning photography. Mood: Completely disheveled, unkempt hair, head resting heavily against a massive coffee mug, eyes glazed over with severe, unmotivated morning exhaustion. High grain film texture, cold natural light.

Style: Fluid watercolor painting with bleeding edges. Mood: Melancholic slumped posture, face melting into dark gloomy indigo and charcoal washes showing intense post-weekend fatigue and sadness. Faint depressing morning fog textures.

Style: Minimalist fine-line art portrait. Mood: Head buried heavily in both hands, slumped forward, capturing the raw essence of complete morning defeat and exhaustion. Clean cream-colored background, single-line aesthetic.

Style: Textured chalk illustration. Mood: Completely dazed, hollow-eyed facial expression, deep lines of fatigue. Dark heavy background with a single dim, flickering overhead light bulb graphic softly blurred.

Style: 1970s retro film still. Mood: Crushing Monday fatigue, slow dragging posture, pale face. Deeply desaturated somber yellow and sickly brown tones, heavy oppressive film grain, dim vintage lighting.

Style: 3D smooth matte digital render. Mood: Chin resting heavily on a flat desk surface, staring blankly with an entirely empty, exhausted, and unmotivated gaze. Cold diffused lighting, plain dark color canvas.

Style: Pop-art halftone illustration. Mood: Grim, completely miserable look of alarm-clock dread, heavy drooping eyelids with bold shadow dots. Clean desaturated background, stark and uninviting tones.

Style: High-contrast cinematic photo. Mood: Somber morning window lighting illuminating a deeply slouched, completely defeated posture, face frozen in a long, weary, exhausted sigh. Cold shadows, minimal background.

Style: Graphic novel illustration with clean cross-hatched shading. Mood: Deeply cross-hatched dark shadows under hollow eyes, face contorted in a weary, silent grimace of endless weekly endurance. Dark moody atmosphere with cold background textures.

Style: Realistic overcast outdoor portrait. Mood: Defeated slouch-neck tension, eyes staring downward with profound, grim exhaustion, trapped in a cold overcast atmosphere. Earthy brown and grey desaturated palette, shallow depth of field.

Style: Low-key cinematic portrait. Mood: Deep heavy breathing expression, face cloaked in heavy, oppressive dark blue shadows, looking completely spent and trapped in the workweek. Moody dark backdrop.
